This is a testharness.js-based test.

  assert_idl_attribute: animationstart has animation property property "animation" not found in prototype chain
[FAIL] animationend event is instanceof AnimationEvent
  assert_idl_attribute: animationend has animation property property "animation" not found in prototype chain

  assert_idl_attribute: animationiteration has animation property property "animation" not found in prototype chain
